title: nyctago dichotoma
intro: Nyctago dichotoma, also known as the night-blooming jasmine or night-scented jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nyctago dichotoma include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and other sleep disorders. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
